text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, I spot an exhausted-looking Grass
Wonder on her way to her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ngh, so dizzy... The sky is there, that's the
ground, and that's... Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Tell me, Trainer, do you appreciate how
wonderful it is... to have your feet on solid
ground?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Have you ever seen the red sports car that is
often parked in the academy's lot?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen offered to take me for a spin in it, and I
regret to say I didn't know better.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Have you ever wondered what it would be like if
cars could fly? It's an unforgettable experience...
Haha...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She giggles to herself while staring off into space.
Note to self: steer clear of the sports car.
